title: The Witness Audio: 1,000 Subtle Layers
creator: Andrew Lackey
description: A production report on recording, editing, layering, and placing environmental sound across The Witness's island.
useful: Shows how detailed sound work can support location and attention without relying on a continuous score.

manualLinkStatus.note: Official article opened successfully in a browser; the site rejects some automated checks.

audience: Sound designers and environment teams building a detailed sense of place.
learning: Plan field recording for a large environment
Layer subtle sounds without overwhelming the player
Connect materials and locations to an audio system
